items.creator: @arkreen_network
items.title:
RT by @max_nesin: ⚡️ Green DePIN Initiative: Arkreen 🤝 PowerPod Partnership

PowerPod @PowerPod_People  and Arkreen are joining forces to bring on-chain carbon offsets to Asia’s fast-growing two-wheel electric motorcycle market 🌱🔋 With over 200M electric motorcycles already on the road, we’re enabling green, net-zero charging and driving sustainable mobility 🚀

Get ready for REAL users, REAL income, REAL rewards, and real-time carbon offsets! 🌍⚡️ 

https://medium.com/@arkreen/charging-green-how-arkreens-on-chain-offset-empowers-powerpod-s-sustainable-two-wheel-electric-eb4b93013039

#GreenDePIN #ElectricMobility #Sustainability #CarbonNeutral #DePIN #DeGEN

RT by @AdeleganOm80822: 🚨 Arkreen Community, we’re in the First Round of Online Voting for the Sustainable Innovation Summit! 🌍
Vote for us and show your support! 🎉 After voting, send us a screenshot, and we’ll randomly select 10 lucky participants daily. Each winner will receive 1 Lite Remote Miner + 0.1 ART 🙌

🗳 Cast your vote now for the 17 SDG Challenge!  https://blockchainforgood.xyz/vote/7

Together, let’s tackle global challenges with blockchain technology! 💪🌱

items.title:
RT by @Leon_Vandenberg: 🧵1/ 🚀 Arkreen introduces its latest narrative, redefining carbon assets as public goods in the age of the network state! 🌍✨ By building a decentralized, transparent, and permissionless public network through DePIN and ReFi joint innovation, Arkreen empowers global communities to collectively take climate action for carbon neutrality. Join the movement towards a sustainable, interconnected future. 🌱🔗

https://medium.com/@arkreen/embracing-inclusive-climate-action-how-arkreen-is-pioneering-a-depin-refi-innovation-for-public-5b83c0fbaebe
